parameters.content:
Trigger Layer
                          


Watches Airtable every 1 minute.
Only picks up tickets where Status = "New".
Passes ticket data to the validation layer.

Validation Layer



Checks that ticket has:
- Title (not empty)
- Issue (not empty)
- Status = "New"

TRUE  → Continue to AI Layer
FALSE → Mark ticket as Skipped

value.Error Log: Ticket skipped: Missing Title or Issue field

parameters.content:
AI Layer


Provider: Groq (Free)
Model: llama3-8b-8192

Node 1: 🤖 Summarize with AI
  - HTTP Request to Groq API
  - Temp: 0.3 (consistent output)
  - Returns structured JSON

Node 2: 🧹 Parse AI Response
  - Extracts JSON from response
  - Handles parsing errors safely
  - Passes all data to email layer

Send Email Layer
────────────
Node: 📧 Send to Support Manager

Sends HTML email to support manager
containing full AI generated report.

Fields used:
- email_subject  → Subject line
- email_content  → Full report body
- summary        → AI summary box
- priority       → Priority badge
- suggested_reply → Reply suggestion
- customerEmail  → Recipient

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }}

parameters.content:
LOGGING Layer


Node: ✅ Update Ticket: Summarized

After email is sent successfully,
updates Airtable ticket with:
- Status      → Summarized
- AI Summary  → AI generated summary
- Email Subject → Generated subject
- Email Content → Generated content
- Priority    → AI detected priority
- Processed At → Current timestamp

Creates full audit trail for every ticket.

Error Handling Layer
─────────────
Node 1: 🔎 Check for Errors
  Checks if AI parsing succeeded
  TRUE  → Continue to email
  FALSE → Log error to Airtable

Node 2: ❌ Handle Errors
  Logs AI failures to Airtable
  Sets Status → Error
  Records timestamp + error details

Node 3: ❌ Handle Email Error
  Logs Gmail failures to Airtable
  Sets Status → Error
  Records timestamp

No ticket ever gets lost silently.
Every failure is tracked and logged.

value.Error Log: ={{ "AI Processing failed at: " + new Date().toISOString() + " - Summary: " +$('Parse AI Response').item.json.summary  }}
